# addEdgeAndSave

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the addEdgeAndSave mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk add-edge-and-save --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.dstNode <String> --input.dstPort <String> --input.graphId <UUID> --input.message <String> --input.srcNode <String> --input.srcPort <String>
```

## Examples

### Run addEdgeAndSave

